records.m_Talk_ENG: A-yo!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-yo!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-yo!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go easy on you since you're so slow! I can beat you even if I run on one toe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go easy on you since you're so slow! I can beat you even if I run on one toe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go easy on you since you're so slow! I can beat you even if I run on one toe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can pout, you can cry! But don't blame Santa if you're left high and dry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can pout, you can cry! But don't blame Santa if you're left high and dry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can pout, you can cry! But don't blame Santa if you're left high and dry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Stop it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Stop it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Stop it!

records.m_Talk_DEU: You stop, Chief! How far are you going to chase that thing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You stop, Chief! How far are you going to chase that thing?!

records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sorry. The floor here is super slippery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sorry. The floor here is super slippery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... soap? Who coated the swimming pool floors with soap?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... soap? Who coated the swimming pool floors with soap?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is unexpected. My experience on a great many battlefields has brought me glory, once again.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a lucky day. I didn't think it'd be this easy to catch a wanted criminal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. This is an easy numbers game for us Awakened mercenaries.
